text: During the session, the learner, Badreddine Otmani, focused on Newton's laws, specifically the First Law of Motion, also known as the principle of inertia. The learner demonstrated a good understanding of the concept that the sum of forces is zero when an object is in a state of rest or uniform motion. However, there was initially some difficulty with the concept of inertia itself, which was clarified through simpler explanations and analogies. By the end of the session, the learner expressed that the concept of inertia was clear.
